channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: How Mentorship and Support Helped a Student Overcome Dyslexia
item.description: Felicity Wadsworth, a 21-year-old student, faced numerous challenges throughout her school years due to dyslexia. However, her journey took a positive turn after she enrolled in a weekly after-school ...

item.title: Durban artist Anusha Singh builds a niche with bespoke hand-painted saris
item.description: Durban-based artist Anusha Singh, 56, has developed a distinctive creative business by transforming traditional saris into hand-painted works of wearable art. Operating from her brand, Studio Anusha, ...

item.title: Jigawa SEMA Issues Flood Warning, Lists Vulnerable Areas, Urges Preparedness
item.description: The Jigawa State Emergency Management Agency (SEMA) has issued a flood warning for several parts of the state, urging residents to take preventive measures as the rainy season approaches. In a stateme...

item.title: Fatal Single-Vehicle Crash in East Gwillimbury Leaves One Dead and Three Critically Injured
item.description: A tragic accident occurred in East Gwillimbury, Ontario, on April 26, 2026, when a single-vehicle crash resulted in one fatality and three individuals suffering critical injuries. Emergency services r...

item.title: Matty Juniosa secures spot in 'Britain's Got Talent' finals with another Golden Buzzer
item.description: Filipino singer Matty Juniosa has once again captured the attention of audiences and judges on the international stage. Following a recent performance on 'Britain's Got Talent,' Matty earned another G...

item.title: Sebastian Sawe Sets First Official Sub-Two-Hour Marathon Record at London Marathon
item.description: Kenyan runner Sebastian Sawe made history at the London Marathon by becoming the first athlete to complete a marathon in under two hours during an official competitive race. Sawe finished with a time ...

item.title: Taylor backs preferencing One Nation over Farrer independent in May byelection
item.description: Opposition leader Angus Taylor has justified putting One Nation ahead of high-profile independent Michelle Milthorpe in the upcoming Farrer byelection, describing it as the 'least worst option'. With ...

item.title: President Zardari Highlights Pakistan-China Industrial and Tech Cooperation in China Visit
item.description: President Asif Ali Zardari, during his visit to China, stressed the importance of boosting industrial and technological ties between Pakistan and China. The visit, which began on April 25, 2026, focus...

item.title: Two teenagers drown at De Bakke Beach after being caught in rip currents
item.description: A community in Mossel Bay is reeling after two local teenagers tragically drowned at De Bakke Beach on Saturday, 25 April 2026. The victims, an 18-year-old girl and a 15-year-old boy, were swept away ...

item.title: India condemns comments shared by Trump on birthright citizenship
item.description: India has strongly criticised comments shared by former US President Donald Trump on his social media platform, Truth Social, in which a conservative commentator described India as a 'hellhole'. The r...

item.title: Canadian-Palestinian Artist Samar Hejazi Showcased at the 2026 Met Gala
item.description: Samar Hejazi, a Canadian-Palestinian multidisciplinary artist, will be prominently featured in this year’s Met Gala at New York’s Metropolitan Museum of Art. Known for her intricate textile work, embr...

item.title: Japan Deploys Firefighters to Control Deadly Wildfires in Northern Region
item.description: Japan has deployed 1,400 firefighters and 100 Self-Defence Force personnel to tackle devastating wildfires that have been raging in the northern region for several days. The fires, now on their fifth ...

item.title: Floods in Mombasa Highlight Weak Infrastructure and Leadership Challenges in Nyali
item.description: Heavy rains on Kenya's coast have caused significant flooding in Nyali, Mombasa, exposing the area's infrastructure weaknesses and sparking public debate over leadership as the 2027 elections approach...

item.title: Discovery of Blood Vessels in T. rex Bones Provides New Insight into Dinosaur Biology
item.description: Scientists have made a groundbreaking discovery in the study of Tyrannosaurus rex fossils, revealing preserved blood vessels within a rib of a T. rex known as 'Scotty,' the largest specimen ever found...

item.title: Congress Supporter Killed in Asansol After Argument, Allegations of Political Link to TMC
item.description: A 43-year-old share trader, Debdeep Chatterjee, was beaten to death by a mob in Asansol on Saturday following an argument when his car brushed against a parked motorbike near his home. The incident oc...

item.title: Tuareg Rebels Resume Fighting in Kidal Against Malian Army and Russian Forces
item.description: Fighting has reignited in Kidal, a key northern city in Mali, with clashes between Tuareg rebels and the Malian army, which is supported by Russian mercenaries. The Azawad Liberation Front (FLA) rebel...

item.title: Gunman Apprehended at White House Correspondents’ Dinner; Secret Service Responds
item.description: During the White House Correspondents’ Dinner in Washington, an attempted attack occurred when a man named Cole Tomas Allen charged a security checkpoint, firing a weapon. A Secret Service officer was...

item.title: Fubara Urges Continuity in Tinubu Administration to Consolidate Progress
item.description: Rivers State Governor, Siminalayi Fubara, don show strong support for President Bola Tinubu re-election, talk say Nigeria dey on correct track and e need steady backing to carry forward ongoing reform...

item.title: Timeline of Events Surrounding the Incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner
item.description: The White House Correspondents' Dinner, an annual event where journalists and political figures gather, became the scene of a shocking event when a shooting unfolded. The situation began to unravel as...

item.title: Suspect Arrested After Trump Shooting Incident, To Be Charged On Monday
item.description: A suspect has been arrested after a shooting incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner in Washington, where US President Donald Trump was present. The suspect, identified as 31-year-old Cole ...
